<html lang="en" class="h-full">
	<head>	<script type="text/javascript" src="/ruxitagentjs_ICA15789NPRTUVXfqrux_10331260218130851.js" data-dtconfig="rid=RID_-1815034252|rpid=1157957402|domain=byu.edu|reportUrl=https://bf19966hyx.bf.dynatrace.com/bf|app=5c01f50ec8455dbe|cors=1|owasp=1|featureHash=ICA15789NPRTUVXfqrux|rdnt=1|uxrgce=1|cuc=lg366a9h|mel=100000|expw=1|dpvc=1|lastModification=1771863129750|tp=500,50,0|srbbv=2|agentUri=/ruxitagentjs_ICA15789NPRTUVXfqrux_10331260218130851.js" data-config='{"revision":1771863129750,"beaconUri":"https://bf19966hyx.bf.dynatrace.com/bf","agentUri":"/ruxitagentjs_ICA15789NPRTUVXfqrux_10331260218130851.js","environmentId":"lg366a9h","modules":"ICA15789NPRTUVXfqrux"}' data-envconfig='{"tracestateKeyPrefix":"3d62b73f-6a8f088b"}' data-appconfig='{"app":"5c01f50ec8455dbe"}'></script><script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-H686GYWJFJ"></script>
	<script>
	window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
	function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
	gtag('js', new Date());
	function lsgtag(p){
		let arg={},pn="";
		if(p){arg={'page_path':p};pn=p;}else{pn=document.location.pathname};
		let r=pn.replace("/student,home", "/student/home")
			.replace(/subsessionID=[0-9a-zA-Z_-]{4}/, "")
			.replace(/studentid=\d{9}/, "studentid=")
			.replace(/^\/\.[0-9a-zA-Z_-]{4}/, "")
			.replace(/cid-[0-9a-zA-Z_-]{12}\//, "cid-/")
			.replace(/id-[0-9a-zA-Z_-]{4}/, "id-")
			.replace(/groupid=[0-9a-zA-Z_-]{12}/, "groupid=")
			.replace(/discussionid=[0-9a-zA-Z_-]{12}/, "discussionid=")
			.replace(/[?&]$/, "");
		if(r==""){r="/";}
		arg["page_title"]=r;
		arg["page_location"]=r;
		arg["cookie_domain"]='learningsuite.byu.edu';
		gtag('config', 'G-H686GYWJFJ', arg);
		gtag('event', 'ls_page_view', {page:r,host:document.location.host});
	}
	lsgtag();
	</script>
	<meta charset="UTF-8">
	<meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge,chrome=1">
	<title>BYU Learning Suite</title>
	<meta name="description" content="Brigham Young University's online learning management system">
	<meta name="author" content="BYU Center for Teaching and Learning">
